compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect test quality enforcement overlay and pre-commit gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new test quality review overlay and pre-commit gate.
**Why**: CLAUDE.md and workflow docs need to reference the new overlay, pre-commit gate, and Semgrep dependency.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (new overlay, pre-commit gate, config keys)
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md agent routing table with new test quality reviewer agent
- IN: Update existing workflow docs referencing the sprint test review step
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the test quality overlay, pre-commit gate, and Semgrep dependency
  ← Satisfies: All success criteria (documentation reflects implemented changes)
- When this story is complete, existing workflow docs accurately describe the updated test quality enforcement
  ← Satisfies: All success criteria (documentation reflects implemented changes)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Done definition: Must add the new test quality overlay agent to CLAUDE.md agent routing table, agents/ directory listing, and agent-routing.conf.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Story complete: all tasks closed, docs updated, agent-routing.conf entry added.
comments.author: Test
